title: Reviewer Finding v1
description: Shared output envelope for the specialist reviewer suite (TDD-020 §5.5). Every reviewer agent (qa-edge-case, ux-ui, accessibility, rule-set-enforcement) emits JSON validating against this schema. Downstream consumers: PLAN-020-2 score aggregator, PLAN-017-3 eval runner.

reviewer.description: Stable reviewer identifier (matches the agent frontmatter `name`).

verdict.description: Aggregate verdict derived from finding severities. APPROVE: no findings. CONCERNS: only low/medium findings. REQUEST_CHANGES: any high/critical finding.

score.description: Numeric score 0-100. Computed as 100 - sum(severity_weight) where critical=25, high=15, medium=8, low=3, floored at 0.

findings.description: Zero or more findings. Empty array is valid (paired with verdict APPROVE).

file.description: Repo-relative path of the file the finding applies to.

line.description: 1-based line number. Use 0 for whole-file findings (e.g. missing newline at EOF).

severity.description: Severity tier; drives verdict mapping and score weighting.

title.description: Short headline for the finding (≤200 chars).

description.description: Full description of the issue and why it matters.

rule_id.description: Optional. Set only by the rule-set-enforcement reviewer (SPEC-020-1-03) to attribute the finding back to a project standards rule.
